reviews.comment:
Son unos malandras habría que denunciarlos a la AFIP no hacen Factura A con IVA discriminado, es totalmente ilegal . El ACA debiera tomar cartas en el asunto.Ademas incentivan a no utilizar la aplicación de ypf y asi en efectivo y sin usar la aplicacion si podran facturar

(Translated by Google)
They are crooks and should be reported to the AFIP. They don't issue A invoices with VAT broken down; it's completely illegal. The ACA should take action on this matter. They also encourage people not to use the YPF app, so they can still issue invoices in cash and without using the app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYa09iVHF3RRAB
